welcomeTitle: Where did your tax go in FY 2024-25?
welcomeSubtitle: See Union spending through your salary — using CGA provisional actuals when you load the real split.
newRegimeOnly: New regime only for now — old regime coming soon.
trust: We don't store your income. Calculations happen in your browser.
salaryHint: CTC or in-hand estimate. You can enter exact tax instead.
exactTaxLabel: I will enter my exact tax from Form 16
actualsNote: Income tax only, FY 2024-25 / AY 2025-26 new regime. Spending split uses CGA functional actuals when provided; GST and other indirect taxes are separate.
